headline: Conagra Vs. Hormel: 2 Beaten‑Down, High‑Yield Food Giants Face Off
summary: Conagra Brands, Inc. and Hormel Foods Corporation are Buy-rated: defensive dividend stocks with protein-focused brands. Click for more on CAG and HRL shares.

headline: Is Hormel Foods (HRL) Offering Value After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Hormel Foods at around US$21.13 is starting to look attractive, the key question is how that price stacks up against what the business might be worth. The stock has recently been under pressure, with returns of 4.3% decline over 7 days, 9.5% decline over 30 days, 9.7% decline year to date, and 25.2% decline over the past year, while the 3 year and 5 year returns of 41.2% decline and 47.1% decline show a longer period of weakness. Recent news around Hormel Foods...

headline: JPMorgan Downgrades Hormel (HRL) to Neutral on Rising Cost Pressures
summary: Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE:HRL) is included among the 15 Best Cheap Dividend Stocks to Buy. On April 9, JPMorgan downgraded Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE:HRL) to Neutral from Overweight. It lowered the stock’s price target to $23 from $28. The firm said margin pressure is starting to build and is not reflected in the company’s 2026 […]
